const readmeConfig = {
    name: "table-view",
    summary: "<p><code>@kne/table-view</code> 是一个基于 React 和 Ant Design 的表格视图组件库，提供轻量灵活的 CSS Grid 表格布局，以及列渲染、格式化、排序、行选择等开箱即用的能力。专注于表格视图层与列渲染体系，可单独使用或嵌入业务页面。</p>\n<h3>核心组件</h3>\n<h4>TableView</h4>\n<p>基于 CSS Grid 的表格视图组件，以栅格布局实现表头与表体的对齐展示。相比于 antd <code>Table</code>，它更轻量灵活，适合需要自定义渲染、移动端适配或卡片式表格场景。支持：</p>\n<ul>\n<li>基于 24 栅格的列宽分配（<code>span</code> 属性）与固定宽度（<code>width</code>）</li>\n<li>CSS Grid 自动布局，内容超出时自动撑开</li>\n<li>行选择（checkbox 多选 / radio 单选）</li>\n<li>树形数据（<code>dataType</code>: <code>list</code> / <code>tree</code> / <code>treeList</code>），支持展开收起、层级缩进与全选含收起子行</li>\n<li>行点击事件与自定义 <code>render</code> 拆分表头/表体</li>\n<li>通过 <code>sortRender</code> 配合 <code>useSort</code> 实现表头排序</li>\n</ul>\n<h3>核心 Hooks</h3>\n<h4>useSelectedRow</h4>\n<p>行选择 Hook，支持多选（checkbox）和单选（radio）两种模式。提供 <code>getRowSelection(dataSource)</code> 生成标准 <code>rowSelection</code> 配置，以及 <code>selectedRowKeys</code>、<code>selectedRows</code>、<code>clearSelectedRows</code> 等状态管理能力。</p>\n<h4>useSort</h4>\n<p>排序 Hook，配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>sortRender</code> 实现表头排序交互。支持单列排序与多列排序，排序状态循环切换：DESC → ASC → 取消。提供 <code>sortDataSource</code> 工具函数用于本地排序（包含中文排序）。</p>\n<h3>渲染逻辑</h3>\n<h4>桌面端：CSS Grid 表格</h4>\n<p><code>TableView</code> 默认以 CSS Grid 渲染表头与表体。列配置经 <code>resolveColumns</code> 解析后，按 <code>display !== false</code> 过滤得到布局列，再计算 <code>gridTemplateColumns</code>（支持 <code>span</code> 栅格、<code>width</code> 固定宽、列宽拖动后的 <code>colsSize</code>）。每行数据走统一的单元格渲染管线：</p>\n<ol>\n<li><strong><code>computeColumnsValue</code></strong>：按列取原始值（<code>getValueOf</code> 或 <code>dataSource[name]</code>），经 <code>format</code> 格式化，过滤 <code>display</code> 为 false 或空值不展示的行</li>\n<li><strong><code>computeDisplay</code></strong>：空值走 <code>placeholder</code> / <code>renderPlaceholder</code>；非空值调用列 <code>render</code>（见下方优先级）</li>\n<li><strong><code>renderCellContent</code></strong>：按列 <code>ellipsis</code> / <code>cellFullWidth</code> 包裹 <code>Ellipsis</code> 与宽度约束后输出</li>\n</ol>\n<p>自定义外层布局时，可通过 <code>render={({ header, renderBody }) =&gt; ...}</code> 拆分表头与表体；无数据时仍渲染表头并展示 <code>empty</code>。</p>\n<h4>列渲染优先级</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>优先级</th>\n<th>来源</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>1</td>\n<td><code>column.render</code></td>\n<td>自定义函数，<strong>最高优先级</strong>；存在时不再走 <code>renderType</code> 内置渲染</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>2</td>\n<td><code>renderType</code></td>\n<td>声明式类型（<code>main</code>、<code>amount</code>、<code>tag</code>、<code>status</code>、<code>tagList</code>、<code>list</code>、<code>options</code>、<code>description</code> 等），由 <code>resolveColumn</code> 注入对应 <code>render</code> 与列宽维度</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>3</td>\n<td>原始值</td>\n<td>无 <code>render</code> 且无有效 <code>renderType</code> 时，直接展示格式化后的 <code>value</code></td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p><code>render</code> 与 <code>renderType</code> 可同时配置：<code>renderType</code> 仍负责注入 <code>width</code> / <code>min</code> / <code>max</code> / <code>ellipsis</code> 等布局维度，仅单元格内容由 <code>render</code> 覆盖。</p>\n<p><code>renderType</code> 支持尺寸修饰符组合，如 <code>enum-small</code>、<code>main-large</code>（<code>short</code> / <code>small</code> / <code>large</code>），维度可通过 <code>globalParams.renderTypeSize</code> 全局覆盖。</p>\n<h4>移动端：<code>renderMobile</code></h4>\n<p>移动端判断统一使用 <code>@kne/responsive-utils</code> 的 <code>useIsMobile()</code>（断点 768px）。仅当 <code>isRenderMobileActive(renderMobile, isMobile)</code> 为 true 时启用移动端专用渲染，桌面端始终走 Grid 或 <code>render</code>。</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th><code>renderMobile</code> 值</th>\n<th>行为</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>默认卡片 List（<code>MobileCardList</code>）：每行一张卡片，普通列纵向「标题 + 内容」，<code>options</code> 操作列固定右侧</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>function</code></td>\n<td>签名与 <code>render</code> 一致 <code>({ header, renderBody, ...props }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>，<strong>完全接管</strong>移动端渲染，优先级高于 <code>render</code>；可调用 <code>renderBody()</code> 复用默认卡片</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>string</code></td>\n<td>从 <code>preset({ renderMobile: { [name]: fn } })</code> 按名称查找；找到等同 function，<strong>未注册则视为未开启</strong>，移动端回退普通表格</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>未设置 / <code>false</code> / 未注册 string</td>\n<td>不开启移动端专用渲染，移动端仍显示 Grid 表格</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>默认卡片 List 细节：</p>\n<ul>\n<li>普通列与 <code>options</code> 列分离：<code>isOptionsColumn</code> 识别操作列，字段列在卡片主体纵向排列，操作列在右侧独立区域</li>\n<li>移动端操作区紧凑展示：<code>options</code> 列设置 <code>mobileOptions</code> 与 <code>buttonGroup.showLength: 0</code>，仅保留「⋯」入口，避免按钮截断</li>\n<li>支持 <code>rowSelection</code>（左侧 checkbox / radio）；<code>allowSelectedAll</code> 时列表顶部显示全选</li>\n<li>卡片 padding 跟随 <code>size</code>，复用 <code>--kne-table-cell-padding</code> CSS 变量</li>\n</ul>\n<h3>列渲染类型系统</h3>\n<p>通过 <code>renderType</code> 属性，可以用声明式的方式定义列的渲染样式，无需手写 <code>render</code> 函数。内置 <code>main</code>、<code>amount</code>、<code>tag</code>、<code>status</code>、<code>tagList</code>、<code>list</code>、<code>options</code>、<code>description</code> 等类型，并支持与 <code>short</code> / <code>small</code> / <code>large</code> 尺寸修饰组合。</p>\n<p>配合 <code>format</code> 属性可实现日期、金额、布尔值等展示格式化；配合 <code>getValueOf</code> 可传入 render 所需的复杂数据结构。</p>\n<h3>工具函数</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>导出项</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>computeColumnsValue</code> / <code>computeDisplay</code></td>\n<td>列值计算与展示渲染</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>formatView</code> / <code>defaultFormat</code></td>\n<td>声明式值格式化</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>resolveColumns</code> / <code>resolveColumn</code></td>\n<td>列配置解析，自动注入 renderType 对应的 render 与宽度</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>preset</code> / <code>globalParams</code></td>\n<td>全局参数预设，定制 renderType 映射与标签颜色</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTagColor</code> / <code>renderTagItem</code> / <code>renderTagList</code></td>\n<td>Tag 渲染工具</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getStatusType</code> / <code>renderStatusItem</code></td>\n<td>Status 渲染工具</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>buildTreeFromList</code> / <code>normalizeTreeData</code> / <code>flattenVisibleTree</code> / <code>flattenAllTree</code></td>\n<td>树形数据组装与展平</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>collectExpandableKeys</code> / <code>toggleExpandedKey</code> / <code>isTreeDataType</code></td>\n<td>树形展开状态工具</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>mergeTreeChildren</code> / <code>nodeCanExpand</code></td>\n<td>懒加载合并子节点 / 是否可展开</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTreeBreadcrumbItems</code></td>\n<td>移动端树形面包屑路径节点</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>toggleTreeCheck</code> / <code>getTreeCheckState</code> / <code>buildTreeKeyMaps</code></td>\n<td>树形勾选关联（checkRelation）</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>使用场景</h3>\n<ul>\n<li><strong>详情页信息展示</strong>：在 InfoPage 等场景中展示结构化数据列表</li>\n<li><strong>轻量列表页</strong>：不需要 antd Table 复杂能力时的简洁表格</li>\n<li><strong>移动端适配</strong>：<code>renderMobile</code> 启用卡片 List，或 CSS Grid 栅格式展示</li>\n<li><strong>自定义表格渲染</strong>：通过 <code>render</code> 属性拆分表头与表体，灵活组合布局</li>\n<li><strong>列渲染复用</strong>：<code>renderType</code> 体系统一 tag、status、amount 等常见列样式</li>\n</ul>",
    description: "A React table view component with column rendering, computed columns, formatting and sorting utilities",
    packageName: "@kne/table-view",
    api: "<h3>TableView</h3>\n<p>表格视图组件，基于 CSS Grid 布局实现，支持列配置、行选择、排序、自定义渲染等能力。</p>\n<h4>属性</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>dataSource</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>表格数据源</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>columns</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列配置，见下方 columns 说明</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>rowKey</td>\n<td>string | function</td>\n<td><code>'id'</code></td>\n<td>行唯一标识字段名或取值函数</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>rowSelection</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>行选择配置，见下方 rowSelection 说明</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>placeholder</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'-'</code></td>\n<td>空值占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>emptyIsPlaceholder</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>空值是否显示占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>valueIsEmpty</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>@kne/is-empty</code></td>\n<td>判断值是否为空的函数</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>empty</td>\n<td>ReactNode</td>\n<td><code>&lt;Empty /&gt;</code></td>\n<td>无数据时的展示内容</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>headerStyle</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>表头自定义样式，仅在 <code>render</code> 自定义渲染时作用于 <code>header</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onRowSelect</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>行点击回调 <code>(item, { columns, dataSource }) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>render</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>自定义渲染 <code>({ header, renderBody }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>，可拆分表头与表体；返回值会包在默认 <code>.info-page-table</code> 容器内，单元格 padding 与普通 TableView 一致</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>renderMobile</td>\n<td>boolean | function | string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>仅移动端生效。<code>true</code> 使用默认卡片 List；为 function 时完全接管渲染（见下方回调参数）；为 string 时从 <code>preset({ renderMobile })</code> 按名称取渲染函数，未注册则视为未开启</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>sortRender</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>排序按钮渲染，由 <code>useSort</code> 提供（桌面端表头）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>mobileSortToolbar</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>移动端排序工具栏，由 <code>useSort</code> 提供；与 <code>sortRender</code> 配合传入 TableView，由 <code>renderToolbar</code> / 默认卡片复用</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>context</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列渲染上下文，会传入 <code>render</code>、<code>getValueOf</code> 等回调</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>className</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>自定义类名</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>size</td>\n<td><code>'small'</code> | <code>'large'</code></td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>单元格内边距：默认 <code>8px</code>，<code>small</code> 为 <code>4px</code>，<code>large</code> 为 <code>14px 8px</code>；可通过 CSS 变量覆盖，见下方说明</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>dataType</td>\n<td><code>'list'</code> | <code>'tree'</code> | <code>'treeList'</code></td>\n<td><code>'list'</code></td>\n<td>数据形态。<code>list</code> 为扁平列表；<code>tree</code> 使用 <code>childrenKey</code> 嵌套子节点；<code>treeList</code> 按 <code>parentKey</code> 组装为树（空父级为根）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>parentKey</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'parentId'</code></td>\n<td><code>treeList</code> 模式下父子关联字段</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>childrenKey</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'children'</code></td>\n<td><code>tree</code> / 组装后的子节点字段名</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>hasChildrenKey</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'hasChildren'</code></td>\n<td>节点是否仍有子级的标记字段；为 <code>true</code> 时即使尚无 <code>children</code> 也显示展开三角</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>treeTitleKey</td>\n<td>string | function</td>\n<td><code>'name'</code></td>\n<td>移动端树形面包屑文案字段；为 function 时签名 <code>(item) =&gt; string</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onLoadChildren</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>懒加载：<code>(item, { key }) =&gt; void | Promise</code>；首次展开且本地无子节点时触发，组件不改 dataSource，请用 <code>mergeTreeChildren</code> 合并</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>expandedKeys</td>\n<td><code>true</code> | <code>false</code> | <code>Array</code></td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>受控展开。<code>true</code> 全部展开，<code>false</code> 全部收起，数组为展开的行 key</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>defaultExpandedKeys</td>\n<td><code>true</code> | <code>false</code> | <code>Array</code></td>\n<td><code>false</code></td>\n<td>非受控初始展开状态</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onExpandedKeysChange</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>展开变化回调 <code>(keys) =&gt; void</code>；单节点切换时为 key 数组，全开/全关可为 <code>true</code> / <code>false</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>indentSize</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td><code>16</code></td>\n<td>树形每层缩进宽度（px）</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>树形模式说明：</p>\n<ul>\n<li>首列在勾选/单选前显示展开三角；无 <code>rowSelection</code> 时三角占原勾选位置</li>\n<li>子级行（<code>level &gt; 0</code>）默认灰色背景</li>\n<li>全选范围包含<strong>全部节点</strong>（含收起的子行）；表体仅渲染当前展开可见行</li>\n<li>移动端默认卡片同样支持缩进与展开三角，全选基于全部节点</li>\n<li>懒加载：<code>hasChildren === true</code> 且无本地子节点时，展开会调用 <code>onLoadChildren</code>，三角显示 loading；同一节点只自动请求一次</li>\n<li>移动端树形卡片顶部：<code>展开三角</code> + <code>checkbox/radio</code>（若有）+ <code>面包屑</code>（根到当前节点路径，按 <code>treeTitleKey</code> 取值，<code>/</code> 分隔）</li>\n</ul>\n<p><code>renderMobile</code> 为 function 时，TableView 会传入已接好 <code>rowSelection</code> / <code>mobileSortToolbar</code> 的能力，自定义布局只需选用，不必自己实现全选或排序：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>回调参数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>dataSource</code></td>\n<td>原始数据源</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>displayDataSource</code></td>\n<td>树形下为当前展开可见行；非树形与 <code>dataSource</code> 相同</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>columns</code></td>\n<td>布局后的列配置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>rowKey</code> / <code>rowSelection</code> / <code>context</code> / <code>empty</code></td>\n<td>与 TableView 一致</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>isTree</code></td>\n<td>是否为树形模式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderBody</code></td>\n<td>渲染默认移动端卡片 List（含顶部工具栏）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderToolbar</code></td>\n<td>渲染组件级工具栏（全选居左、排序居右）；可自由决定摆放位置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getRowKey(item)</code></td>\n<td>按 <code>rowKey</code> 取行 key</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getSelectionProps(item)</code></td>\n<td>返回 <code>{ checked, indeterminate, disabled, onChange }</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTreeRowMeta(item)</code></td>\n<td>树形行 meta：<code>{ key, level, hasChildren, expanded }</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getBreadcrumb(item)</code></td>\n<td>面包屑文案数组（根 → 当前）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>isExpandLoading(item)</code></td>\n<td>该行是否正在懒加载子节点</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>onToggleExpand(key)</code></td>\n<td>切换展开</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>onSelectionChange</code></td>\n<td>行选择切换，签名与内部逻辑一致</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<pre><code class=\"language-jsx\">renderMobile={({ displayDataSource, renderToolbar, getSelectionProps, getRowKey, getTreeRowMeta, getBreadcrumb, onToggleExpand }) =&gt; (\n  &lt;&gt;\n    {renderToolbar()}\n    {displayDataSource.map(item =&gt; {\n      const selection = getSelectionProps(item);\n      const meta = getTreeRowMeta(item);\n      return &lt;MyTreeCard key={getRowKey(item)} item={item} meta={meta} breadcrumb={getBreadcrumb(item)} onExpand={() =&gt; onToggleExpand(getRowKey(item))} {...selection} /&gt;;\n    })}\n  &lt;/&gt;\n)}\n</code></pre>\n<p><code>renderMobile</code> 默认卡片 List 行为：</p>\n<ul>\n<li>每行一张卡片，卡片间距 <code>12px</code>，表格外边框隐藏</li>\n<li>卡片 padding 跟随 <code>size</code>（复用 <code>--kne-table-cell-padding</code>）</li>\n<li>普通列以「标题 + 内容」纵向排列；<code>options</code> 操作列固定在卡片右侧（ButtonGroup）</li>\n<li>支持 <code>rowSelection</code>（左侧 checkbox / radio）；开启 <code>allowSelectedAll</code> 或排序（传入 <code>mobileSortToolbar</code>）时，卡片列表顶部显示工具栏：<strong>全选居左</strong>、<strong>排序居右</strong>（下拉选择排序列，方向为单图标，点击按「降序 → 升序 → 取消」循环，与 PC 端列头排序一致；也可在下拉选「取消排序」清除）</li>\n<li>树形（<code>dataType</code> 为 <code>tree</code> / <code>treeList</code>）时卡片顶部为：<code>展开三角</code> + <code>勾选</code>（若有）+ <code>面包屑</code>（根到当前，按 <code>treeTitleKey</code>，<code>/</code> 分隔）</li>\n<li>为 string 时通过 <code>preset({ renderMobile: { [name]: renderFn } })</code> 注册，用法：<code>renderMobile=\"orderCard\"</code></li>\n</ul>\n<p>字符串类型说明：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>值</th>\n<th>行为</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>默认卡片 List</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>function</code></td>\n<td>自定义渲染，完全接管</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>string</code></td>\n<td>从 preset 查找同名渲染函数；找到则等同 function，未找到则移动端回退普通表格</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>false</code> / 未注册 string</td>\n<td>不开启移动端专用渲染</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>单元格 padding 由 CSS 变量控制，可在外层覆盖：</p>\n<pre><code class=\"language-css\">.info-page-table {\n  --kne-table-cell-padding-default: 8px; /* 默认 size */\n  --kne-table-cell-padding-small: 4px; /* size=\"small\" */\n  --kne-table-cell-padding-large: 14px 8px; /* size=\"large\" */\n  /* 或直接覆盖当前生效值：--kne-table-cell-padding: 10px; */\n}\n</code></pre>\n<h4>columns</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>name</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>字段名，对应 dataSource 中的属性</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>title</td>\n<td>ReactNode</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列标题</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>width</td>\n<td>number | string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列最小宽度，支持数字（如 <code>180</code>，视为 180px）或字符串（如 <code>'180px'</code>），内容超出时会自动撑开</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>span</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列占比（基于 24 栅格），未设置时自动均分剩余栅格</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>min</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列最小宽度（px），由 renderType 自动注入，也可手动覆盖</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>max</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列最大宽度（px），由 renderType 自动注入，也可手动覆盖</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>align</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'top'</code></td>\n<td>垂直对齐方式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>justify</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'flex-start'</code></td>\n<td>水平对齐方式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>format</td>\n<td>string | function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>值格式化，见下方 format 说明</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>render</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>自定义单元格渲染 <code>(value, { column, dataSource, context }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>；与 <code>renderType</code> 同时存在时优先级最高</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>renderType</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>声明式列渲染类型，见下方 renderType 说明；存在 <code>render</code> 时仅保留列宽等维度，不参与单元格渲染</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>getValueOf</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>自定义取值 <code>(dataSource, { column, context }) =&gt; any</code>，用于 render 所需复杂数据</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>sort</td>\n<td>boolean | object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>是否支持排序，<code>{ single: true }</code> 为单列排序</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>ellipsis</td>\n<td>boolean | object</td>\n<td><code>false</code></td>\n<td>超出省略，基于 antd Typography；<code>true</code> 开启省略与 tooltip，<code>{ showTitle: false }</code> 关闭 tooltip</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>display</td>\n<td>boolean | function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>是否显示该列</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>emptyIsPlaceholder</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>该列空值是否显示占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>placeholder</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>该列空值占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>renderPlaceholder</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>自定义空值渲染</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>type</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列类型，如 <code>'options'</code> 表示操作列</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>primary</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>main 类型：是否显示主色样式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>hover</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>main 类型：是否显示悬停样式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onClick</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>main 类型：点击回调 <code>({ item, colItem, event }) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>split</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>list 类型：列表项分隔符，默认 <code>,</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>buttonGroup</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>options 类型：透传给 <code>@kne/button-group</code> 的属性</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>rowSelection</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>type</td>\n<td><code>'checkbox'</code> | <code>'radio'</code></td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>选择类型</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>selectedRowKeys</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>已选中的行 key 列表</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onChange</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>选中变化回调 <code>(selectedRowKeys, id, { context, checked }) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>allowSelectedAll</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>是否允许全选（仅 checkbox 模式）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>isSelectedAll</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>是否全选状态</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onIsSelectAllChange</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>全选状态变化回调</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>checkRelation</td>\n<td><code>'parent'</code> | <code>'all'</code> | <code>'independent'</code></td>\n<td><code>'parent'</code></td>\n<td>树形 checkbox 父子勾选关联。仅 <code>dataType</code> 为 <code>tree</code> / <code>treeList</code> 时生效：<code>parent</code> 勾父级时子级 UI 全勾但值只留父级，取消子级会拆分父级，半选；<code>all</code> 值含父级与全部子孙，半选；<code>independent</code> 父子互不影响</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>树形 <code>checkRelation</code> 补充说明：</p>\n<ul>\n<li><code>parent</code>（默认）：勾选节点会写入该 key 并去掉其子孙 key；子级全部勾选后折叠为父级；父级半选表示部分子孙被选</li>\n<li><code>all</code>：勾选/取消同步增删子孙 key；子级全选时父级也写入值；父级半选</li>\n<li><code>independent</code>：点哪个改哪个，无半选联动</li>\n<li>全选：<code>parent</code> 写入各根节点 key；<code>all</code> / <code>independent</code> 写入全部节点 key（含收起子行）</li>\n</ul>\n<h4>静态属性</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>TableView.Header</td>\n<td>Component</td>\n<td>表头组件，可单独使用</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>TableView.useSelectedRow</td>\n<td>Hook</td>\n<td>行选择 Hook</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>TableView.useSort</td>\n<td>Hook</td>\n<td>排序 Hook</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>TableView.sortDataSource</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>本地排序工具函数</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>示例</h4>\n<pre><code class=\"language-jsx\">&lt;TableView\n  dataSource={dataSource}\n  columns={[\n    { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 160, renderType: 'small' },\n    { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },\n    { name: 'amount', title: '金额', renderType: 'amount', format: 'number-style:decimal-suffix:元' }\n  ]}\n  rowSelection={{\n    type: 'checkbox',\n    selectedRowKeys,\n    onChange: setSelectedRowKeys\n  }}\n/&gt;\n</code></pre>\n<p>完整示例见文档 <code>TableView</code>。</p>\n<h3>useSelectedRow</h3>\n<p>行选择 Hook，用于配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>rowSelection</code>。</p>\n<h4>参数</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>rowKey</td>\n<td>string | function</td>\n<td><code>'id'</code></td>\n<td>行唯一标识</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>type</td>\n<td><code>'checkbox'</code> | <code>'radio'</code></td>\n<td><code>'checkbox'</code></td>\n<td>选择类型</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>返回值</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>selectedRowKeys</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>已选行 key 列表</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>selectedRows</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>已选行数据</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onSelect</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>(item, checked) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onSelectAll</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>(checked, selected, items) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>setSelectedRows</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>直接设置已选行数据</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>setSelectedRowKeys</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>(keys, dataSource) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>clearSelectedRows</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>清空选择</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>getRowSelection</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>(dataSource, extra?) =&gt; rowSelection</code> 生成 <code>rowSelection</code> 配置</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>示例</h4>\n<pre><code class=\"language-jsx\">const { selectedRowKeys, selectedRows, getRowSelection, clearSelectedRows } = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });\n\n&lt;TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} rowSelection={getRowSelection(dataSource)} /&gt;;\n</code></pre>\n<p>完整示例见文档 <code>useSelectedRow</code>。</p>\n<h3>useSort</h3>\n<p>排序 Hook，配合 <code>TableView</code> 的 <code>sortRender</code> 实现表头排序。</p>\n<h4>参数</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>sort</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>受控排序值 <code>[{ name, sort: 'ASC' | 'DESC' }]</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>defaultSort</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td><code>[]</code></td>\n<td>默认排序</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onSortChange</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>排序变化回调 <code>(sort) =&gt; void</code></td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>返回值</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>sort</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>当前排序配置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>setSort</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>设置排序</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>sortRender</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>({ name, single }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>，传给 TableView 表头</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>mobileSortToolbar</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td><code>({ columns }) =&gt; ReactNode</code>，传给 TableView 移动端工具栏右侧</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>columns.sort</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>开启排序，默认单列模式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>{ single: true }</code></td>\n<td>单列排序，切换列时清除其他列</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>{ single: false }</code></td>\n<td>多列排序</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>sortDataSource</h4>\n<p>本地排序工具函数：<code>sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns)</code>。支持数字排序与中文 <code>localeCompare</code> 排序，空值始终排在末尾。</p>\n<h4>示例</h4>\n<pre><code class=\"language-jsx\">const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({ onSortChange: console.log });\nconst sortedData = useMemo(() =&gt; TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort, dataSource]);\n\n&lt;TableView dataSource={sortedData} columns={columns} sortRender={sortRender} mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar} /&gt;;\n</code></pre>\n<p>完整示例见文档 <code>useSort</code>。</p>\n<h3>renderType</h3>\n<p>通过 <code>columns.renderType</code> 声明列的渲染方式，无需手写 <code>render</code>。可与尺寸修饰词组合。若同时配置了 <code>columns.render</code>，则以 <code>render</code> 为准（优先级最高），<code>renderType</code> 仍可注入 width / min / max 等维度。</p>\n<h4>内置类型</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>默认宽度</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>main</code></td>\n<td>主信息列，支持 <code>primary</code> / <code>hover</code> / <code>onClick</code>，自动省略</td>\n<td>300px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>amount</code></td>\n<td>金额列，右对齐，自动省略</td>\n<td>140px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>options</code></td>\n<td>操作列，铺满单元格，配合 <code>@kne/button-group</code></td>\n<td>180px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>tag</code></td>\n<td>单个 Tag，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{ type, text }</code></td>\n<td>140px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>status</code></td>\n<td>状态 Badge，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{ type, text }</code></td>\n<td>100px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>tagList</code></td>\n<td>多个 Tag 列表</td>\n<td>300px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>list</code></td>\n<td>文本列表，可用 <code>split</code> 指定分隔符</td>\n<td>200px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>description</code></td>\n<td>长文本描述列，自动省略</td>\n<td>400px</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>尺寸修饰词</h4>\n<p>可与类型组合，如 <code>tag-short</code>、<code>status-small</code>、<code>main-large</code>：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>修饰词</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>宽度</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>short</code></td>\n<td>缩短列宽</td>\n<td>120px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>small</code></td>\n<td>最小列宽</td>\n<td>100px</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>large</code></td>\n<td>放大列宽</td>\n<td>300px</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>options 列按钮配置</h4>\n<p><code>getValueOf</code> 返回按钮配置数组，每项支持：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>children</td>\n<td>ReactNode</td>\n<td>按钮文案</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>onClick</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>点击回调</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>isDelete</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>是否为删除操作（弹出确认）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>message</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>删除确认文案</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>hidden</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>是否隐藏</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>完整示例见文档 <code>renderType</code>。</p>\n<h3>format</h3>\n<p>通过 <code>columns.format</code> 声明式格式化展示值，支持链式组合（空格分隔多个格式化器）。</p>\n<h4>内置格式化器</h4>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>名称</th>\n<th>参数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>示例</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>date</code></td>\n<td>模板</td>\n<td>日期格式化</td>\n<td><code>format: 'date'</code> 或 <code>format: 'date-YYYY/MM/DD'</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>datetime</code></td>\n<td>模板</td>\n<td>日期时间格式化</td>\n<td><code>format: 'datetime'</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>dateRange</code></td>\n<td>模板, allow</td>\n<td>日期范围</td>\n<td><code>format: 'dateRange-YYYY-MM-DD-allow'</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>boolean</code></td>\n<td>trueValue</td>\n<td>布尔值转是/否</td>\n<td><code>format: 'boolean'</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>number</code></td>\n<td>见下方</td>\n<td>数字格式化</td>\n<td><code>format: 'number-style:decimal-suffix:元'</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>money</code></td>\n<td>单位</td>\n<td>金额拼接</td>\n<td><code>format: 'money-元'</code></td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h4>number 格式化参数</h4>\n<p>通过 <code>calcArgs</code> 解析，格式为 <code>number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元</code>：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>参数</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>style</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'decimal'</code></td>\n<td>Intl 数字样式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>unit</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td><code>1</code></td>\n<td>除数</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>maximumFractionDigits</td>\n<td>number</td>\n<td><code>2</code></td>\n<td>最大小数位</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>useGrouping</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>是否使用千分位</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>roundingMode</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>'halfExpand'</code></td>\n<td>舍入模式</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>suffix</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td><code>''</code></td>\n<td>后缀</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p>也可传入函数：<code>format: (value, { dataSource, column, context }) =&gt; string</code>。</p>\n<h3>preset / globalParams</h3>\n<p>全局参数预设，用于定制 renderType 映射、列宽与标签颜色。</p>\n<pre><code class=\"language-jsx\">import { preset } from '@kne/table-view';\n\npreset({\n  renderTypeSize: {\n    main: { width: 400, min: 200, max: 600 }\n  },\n  renderMobile: {\n    orderCard: ({ renderBody }) =&gt; &lt;div&gt;{renderBody()}&lt;/div&gt;\n  },\n  tagTypeColors: {\n    custom: '#1890ff'\n  },\n  statusTypeColors: {\n    custom: '#52c41a'\n  }\n});\n</code></pre>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>renderType</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>自定义 renderType 映射</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>renderTypeSize</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>覆盖内置类型的 width / min / max</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>renderMobile</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>注册移动端渲染函数，<code>renderMobile=\"name\"</code> 时按名称查找</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>tagTypeColors</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>Tag 颜色映射</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>statusTypeColors</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>Status 颜色映射</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>列解析工具</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>函数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>resolveColumns(columns)</code></td>\n<td>批量解析列配置，自动注入 render、width、ellipsis 等</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>resolveColumn(column)</code></td>\n<td>解析单个列配置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>parseRenderType(renderType)</code></td>\n<td>解析 renderType 字符串，返回 <code>{ type, size }</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>resolveRenderType(renderType)</code></td>\n<td>解析 renderType 并返回完整维度信息</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getColumnRender(column)</code></td>\n<td>获取列的 render 函数</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getRenderTypeNames()</code></td>\n<td>获取所有已注册的 renderType 名称</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>isOptionsColumn(column)</code></td>\n<td>判断是否为操作列</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>resolveRenderMobile(renderMobile)</code></td>\n<td>解析 renderMobile 配置，string 时从 preset 查找</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>isRenderMobileActive(renderMobile, isMobile)</code></td>\n<td>判断当前是否应启用移动端专用渲染</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>列值计算</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>函数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>computeColumnsValue(options)</code></td>\n<td>计算列值，处理 format、display、空值等</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>computeDisplay(options)</code></td>\n<td>根据列值渲染展示内容</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>computeColumnsDisplay(options)</code></td>\n<td>批量计算并渲染列展示内容</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<p><code>computeColumnsValue</code> 参数：</p>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>属性</th>\n<th>类型</th>\n<th>默认值</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>columns</td>\n<td>array</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>列配置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>dataSource</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>行数据</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>context</td>\n<td>object</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>渲染上下文</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>emptyIsPlaceholder</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>空值是否显示占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>valueIsEmpty</td>\n<td>function</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>空值判断函数</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>placeholder</td>\n<td>string</td>\n<td>-</td>\n<td>占位符</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>removeEmpty</td>\n<td>boolean</td>\n<td><code>true</code></td>\n<td>是否过滤 display 为 false 的列</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>渲染工具</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>函数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderCellContent(content, column, className)</code></td>\n<td>渲染单元格内容</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getColumnEllipsis(column)</code></td>\n<td>获取列的 ellipsis 配置</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>wrapColumnHeaderTitle(title)</code></td>\n<td>包装表头标题，支持省略</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderColumnTitle(title, column, sortRender)</code></td>\n<td>渲染带排序的表头标题</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTagColor(type)</code></td>\n<td>获取 Tag 颜色</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderTagItem(value)</code></td>\n<td>渲染单个 Tag</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderTagList(value)</code></td>\n<td>渲染 Tag 列表</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getStatusType(type)</code></td>\n<td>获取 Status 类型</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>renderStatusItem(value)</code></td>\n<td>渲染 Status</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>列宽工具</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>函数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>parseColumnWidth(width)</code></td>\n<td>解析列宽值为数字（px）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getColumnLayout(column, options)</code></td>\n<td>获取列布局信息（widthBased、fillRemaining、style）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getGridTemplateColumns(columns, options)</code></td>\n<td>生成 CSS Grid 模板列</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTreeSelectionColumnWidth(options)</code></td>\n<td>计算树形/选择列宽度</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>hasColumnSpan(column)</code></td>\n<td>是否设置了 span</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>hasColumnWidth(column, columns)</code></td>\n<td>是否设置了 width</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>树形数据工具</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>函数</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>isTreeDataType(dataType)</code></td>\n<td>是否为 <code>tree</code> / <code>treeList</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>buildTreeFromList(list, options)</code></td>\n<td>扁平列表按 <code>parentKey</code> 组装为树</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>normalizeTreeData(dataSource, options)</code></td>\n<td>按 <code>dataType</code> 归一化为树</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>flattenVisibleTree(tree, options)</code></td>\n<td>按展开状态展平可见行</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>flattenAllTree(tree, options)</code></td>\n<td>展平全部节点（含收起子行，用于全选）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>collectExpandableKeys(tree, options)</code></td>\n<td>收集所有可展开节点 key</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>toggleExpandedKey(expandedKeys, key, expandableKeys)</code></td>\n<td>切换单个节点展开状态</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>nodeCanExpand(item, options)</code></td>\n<td>是否显示展开三角（含 hasChildren）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>mergeTreeChildren(dataSource, children, options)</code></td>\n<td>懒加载后合并子节点（tree/treeList）</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTreeBreadcrumbItems(key, maps)</code></td>\n<td>移动端面包屑：根到当前节点的节点列表</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>buildTreeKeyMaps(tree, options)</code></td>\n<td>构建父子/子孙 key 映射</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>toggleTreeCheck(options)</code></td>\n<td>按 checkRelation 切换勾选 keys</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>getTreeCheckState(key, selectedKeys, mode, maps)</code></td>\n<td>返回 <code>{ checked, indeterminate }</code></td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>normalizeParentKeys(keys, maps)</code></td>\n<td>parent 模式折叠全选子树为父 key</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>buildSelectAllKeys</code> / <code>buildClearSelectAllKeys</code></td>\n<td>树形全选 / 取消全选 keys</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n<h3>常量</h3>\n<table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>常量</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td><code>RENDER_TYPE_NAMES</code></td>\n<td>所有 renderType 名称数组</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td><code>SIZE_NAMES</code></td>\n<td>尺寸修饰词数组 <code>['short', 'small', 'large']</code></td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>",
    example: {
        isFull: false,
        className: "",
        style: "",
        list: [{
    title: "TableView",
    description: "表格视图组件，支持行选择、列宽设置、自定义渲染等",
    code: "const { TableView } = _TableView;\nconst { Flex, Tag, Card, Button } = antd;\nconst { useState } = React;\n\nconst orderStatusMap = {\n  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' },\n  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },\n  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },\n  已取消: { type: 'default', text: '已取消' }\n};\n\nconst dataSource = [\n  {\n    id: 'ORD20240115001',\n    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',\n    contact: '张三',\n    phone: '13800138000',\n    amount: 42500,\n    status: '已完成',\n    orderDate: '2024-01-15',\n    deliveryDate: '2024-01-17'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD20240115002',\n    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',\n    contact: '李四',\n    phone: '13900149000',\n    amount: 85000,\n    status: '处理中',\n    orderDate: '2024-01-15',\n    deliveryDate: '2024-01-20'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD20240115003',\n    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',\n    contact: '王五',\n    phone: '13700157000',\n    amount: 120000,\n    status: '待发货',\n    orderDate: '2024-01-14',\n    deliveryDate: '2024-01-22'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD20240115004',\n    customerName: '北京字节跳动科技有限公司',\n    contact: '赵六',\n    phone: '13600166000',\n    amount: 65000,\n    status: '已完成',\n    orderDate: '2024-01-13',\n    deliveryDate: '2024-01-16'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD20240115005',\n    customerName: '百度在线网络技术（北京）有限公司',\n    contact: '钱七',\n    phone: '13500175000',\n    amount: 95000,\n    status: '已取消',\n    orderDate: '2024-01-12',\n    deliveryDate: '',\n    disabled: true\n  }\n];\n\nconst columns = [\n  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 180, renderType: 'small' },\n  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', span: 10, renderType: 'main' },\n  { name: 'contact', title: '联系人', width: 80 },\n  { name: 'phone', title: '联系电话', width: '130px', render: value => value.replace(/(\\d{3})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})/, '$1-$2-$3') },\n  {\n    name: 'amount',\n    title: '订单金额(元)',\n    renderType: 'amount',\n    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'\n  },\n  { name: 'orderDate', title: '下单日期', format: 'date' },\n  { name: 'deliveryDate', title: '预计送达', format: 'date' },\n  {\n    name: 'status',\n    title: '订单状态',\n    width: 100,\n    renderType: 'status',\n    getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }\n  }\n];\n\nconst WithCheckbox = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const totalAmount = selectKeys.reduce((sum, id) => sum + (dataSource.find(d => d.id === id)?.amount || 0), 0);\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>\n        多选 + 全选 — 最后一行「已取消」为 <code>disabled</code>，全选勾选态与选中结果都会跳过该行\n      </div>\n      <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>\n        <span>\n          已选 <strong>{selectKeys.length}</strong> 个订单，总金额 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>\n        </span>\n      </Flex>\n      <TableView\n        dataSource={dataSource}\n        columns={columns}\n        rowSelection={{\n          type: 'checkbox',\n          allowSelectedAll: true,\n          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n          onChange: setSelectKeys\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst WithRadio = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const selectedOrder = dataSource.find(d => d.id === selectKeys[0]);\n  const radioColumns = [\n    { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 160, renderType: 'small' },\n    { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },\n    {\n      name: 'amount',\n      title: '订单金额(元)',\n      width: 120,\n      renderType: 'amount',\n      format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'\n    },\n    {\n      name: 'status',\n      title: '订单状态',\n      width: 100,\n      renderType: 'status',\n      getValueOf: item => orderStatusMap[item.status] || { type: 'default', text: item.status }\n    }\n  ];\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div style={{ marginBottom: 8, color: '#666' }}>单选 — 左侧为 Radio 选择列</div>\n      <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>\n        <span>已选订单：{selectedOrder ? `${selectedOrder.id} (${selectedOrder.customerName})` : '无'}</span>\n        {selectedOrder && <Tag color=\"blue\">¥{selectedOrder.amount.toLocaleString()}</Tag>}\n      </Flex>\n      <TableView\n        dataSource={dataSource}\n        columns={radioColumns}\n        rowSelection={{\n          type: 'radio',\n          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n          onChange: setSelectKeys\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst WithCustomRender = () => {\n  const displayData = dataSource.slice(0, 3);\n  const totalAmount = displayData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);\n\n  return (\n    <Card\n      size=\"small\"\n      title=\"近期订单\"\n      extra={\n        <Button type=\"link\" size=\"small\" onClick={() => console.log('查看全部')}>\n          查看全部\n        </Button>\n      }\n      styles={{ body: { padding: 0 } }}\n    >\n      <Flex\n        justify=\"space-between\"\n        align=\"center\"\n        style={{ padding: '12px 16px', background: '#fafafa', borderBottom: '1px solid #f0f0f0' }}\n      >\n        <Flex gap={8} align=\"center\">\n          <Tag color=\"blue\">{displayData.length} 笔</Tag>\n          <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)', fontSize: 13 }}>\n            合计 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>\n          </span>\n        </Flex>\n        <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', fontSize: 12 }}>render 自定义外层布局</span>\n      </Flex>\n      <TableView\n        dataSource={displayData}\n        columns={columns}\n        render={({ renderBody }) => (\n          <div style={{ overflowX: 'auto' }}>{renderBody(displayData)}</div>\n        )}\n      />\n    </Card>\n  );\n};\n\nconst WithEmpty = () => (\n  <TableView\n    dataSource={[]}\n    columns={columns}\n    empty={\n      <div style={{ padding: 24, color: '#999' }}>\n        暂无订单数据\n      </div>\n    }\n  />\n);\n\nconst BaseExample = () => {\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={24}>\n      <div style={{ background: '#f5f5f5', padding: '12px', borderRadius: '8px' }}>\n        订单列表 - 共 <strong>{dataSource.length}</strong> 个订单\n      </div>\n      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} />\n      <WithCheckbox />\n      <WithRadio />\n      <WithCustomRender />\n      <WithEmpty />\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nrender(<BaseExample />);\n\n",
    scope: [{
    name: "_TableView",
    packageName: "@kne/current-lib_table-view",
    importStatement: "import * as _TableView from \"@kne/table-view\"",
    component: component_1
},{
    name: "antd",
    packageName: "antd",
    component: component_3
}]
},{
    title: "tree",
    description: "树状数据：dataType 为 tree / treeList，支持展开收起、懒加载、移动端默认/自定义卡片",
    code: "const { TableView, mergeTreeChildren } = _TableView;\nconst { Space, Button, Radio, Checkbox, Flex } = antd;\nconst { useState } = React;\n\nconst columns = [\n  { name: 'name', title: '名称', renderType: 'main' },\n  { name: 'code', title: '编码', width: 120 },\n  { name: 'owner', title: '负责人', width: 100 }\n];\n\nconst treeData = [\n  {\n    id: '1',\n    name: '华东区',\n    code: 'EAST',\n    owner: '张三',\n    children: [\n      {\n        id: '1-1',\n        name: '上海',\n        code: 'SH',\n        owner: '李四',\n        children: [\n          { id: '1-1-1', name: '浦东分部', code: 'SH-PD', owner: '王五' },\n          { id: '1-1-2', name: '徐汇分部', code: 'SH-XH', owner: '赵六' }\n        ]\n      },\n      { id: '1-2', name: '杭州', code: 'HZ', owner: '钱七' }\n    ]\n  },\n  {\n    id: '2',\n    name: '华北区',\n    code: 'NORTH',\n    owner: '孙八',\n    children: [{ id: '2-1', name: '北京', code: 'BJ', owner: '周九' }]\n  }\n];\n\nconst treeListData = [\n  { id: '1', name: '华东区', code: 'EAST', owner: '张三', parentId: null },\n  { id: '1-1', name: '上海', code: 'SH', owner: '李四', parentId: '1' },\n  { id: '1-1-1', name: '浦东分部', code: 'SH-PD', owner: '王五', parentId: '1-1' },\n  { id: '1-1-2', name: '徐汇分部', code: 'SH-XH', owner: '赵六', parentId: '1-1' },\n  { id: '1-2', name: '杭州', code: 'HZ', owner: '钱七', parentId: '1' },\n  { id: '2', name: '华北区', code: 'NORTH', owner: '孙八', parentId: '' },\n  { id: '2-1', name: '北京', code: 'BJ', owner: '周九', parentId: '2' }\n];\n\nconst lazyRootData = [\n  { id: 'org-1', name: '集团总部', code: 'HQ', owner: '张三', parentId: null, hasChildren: true },\n  { id: 'org-2', name: '分公司', code: 'BR', owner: '李四', parentId: null, hasChildren: true }\n];\n\nconst lazyChildrenMap = {\n  'org-1': [\n    { id: 'org-1-1', name: '研发中心', code: 'RD', owner: '王五', hasChildren: true },\n    { id: 'org-1-2', name: '市场部', code: 'MKT', owner: '赵六', hasChildren: false }\n  ],\n  'org-1-1': [\n    { id: 'org-1-1-1', name: '前端组', code: 'FE', owner: '钱七', hasChildren: false },\n    { id: 'org-1-1-2', name: '后端组', code: 'BE', owner: '孙八', hasChildren: false }\n  ],\n  'org-2': [{ id: 'org-2-1', name: '华南办', code: 'SC', owner: '周九', hasChildren: false }]\n};\n\nconst OrgTreeMobileCard = ({ item, meta, breadcrumb, checked, indeterminate, disabled, onChange, onExpand, loading }) => {\n  const path = (breadcrumb || []).slice(0, -1);\n  const hasChildren = !!meta?.hasChildren;\n  const level = meta?.level || 0;\n  const isChild = level > 0;\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      style={{\n        background: checked ? 'var(--primary-color-1, #e6f4ff)' : isChild ? 'var(--bg-color-grey-1, #f5f5f5)' : '#fff',\n        border: `1px solid ${checked ? 'var(--primary-color-2, #91caff)' : isChild ? '#e8e8e8' : '#f0f0f0'}`,\n        borderLeft: `${isChild ? level * 18 : 1}px solid ${checked ? 'var(--primary-color, #1677ff)' : isChild ? '#bfbfbf' : '#f0f0f0'}`,\n        borderRadius: 8,\n        padding: '12px 14px',\n        color: checked ? 'var(--primary-color, #1677ff)' : undefined,\n        transition: 'background 200ms, border-color 200ms, border-left-width 200ms'\n      }}\n    >\n      <Flex\n        align=\"center\"\n        gap={8}\n        style={{\n          paddingBottom: 10,\n          marginBottom: 10,\n          borderBottom: `1px solid ${isChild ? '#ebebeb' : '#f0f0f0'}`\n        }}\n      >\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          aria-label={meta?.expanded ? '收起' : '展开'}\n          disabled={!hasChildren || loading}\n          onClick={e => {\n            e.stopPropagation();\n            if (hasChildren) {\n              onExpand?.();\n            }\n          }}\n          style={{\n            width: 22,\n            height: 22,\n            border: 'none',\n            background: 'transparent',\n            padding: 0,\n            display: 'inline-flex',\n            alignItems: 'center',\n            justifyContent: 'center',\n            cursor: hasChildren ? 'pointer' : 'default',\n            color: hasChildren ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' : 'transparent',\n            transform: meta?.expanded ? 'rotate(90deg)' : 'none',\n            transition: 'transform 200ms',\n            flexShrink: 0,\n            fontSize: 12,\n            lineHeight: 1,\n            opacity: loading ? 0.5 : 1\n          }}\n        >\n          {loading ? '…' : '▸'}\n        </button>\n        <Checkbox checked={checked} indeterminate={indeterminate} disabled={disabled} onChange={onChange} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()} />\n        <span\n          style={{\n            flexShrink: 0,\n            fontSize: 11,\n            lineHeight: '18px',\n            padding: '0 6px',\n            borderRadius: 4,\n            background: isChild ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)' : 'var(--primary-color-1, #e6f4ff)',\n            color: isChild ? 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' : 'var(--primary-color, #1677ff)'\n          }}\n        >\n          {isChild ? `子级 L${level}` : '根节点'}\n        </span>\n        <div\n          style={{\n            flex: 1,\n            minWidth: 0,\n            fontSize: 12,\n            lineHeight: '20px',\n            color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)',\n            overflow: 'hidden',\n            textOverflow: 'ellipsis',\n            whiteSpace: 'nowrap'\n          }}\n        >\n          {path.length > 0 ? path.join(' / ') : '—'}\n        </div>\n      </Flex>\n\n      <div style={{ fontSize: isChild ? 14 : 16, fontWeight: isChild ? 500 : 600, lineHeight: 1.4, color: checked ? 'inherit' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.88)' }}>{item.name}</div>\n      <Flex gap={16} style={{ marginTop: 8, fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.5, color: checked ? 'inherit' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' }}>\n        <span>编码 {item.code}</span>\n        <span>负责人 {item.owner}</span>\n      </Flex>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst TreeExample = () => {\n  const { selectedRowKeys, getRowSelection, clearSelectedRows } = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });\n  const mobileSelection = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });\n  const customMobileSelection = TableView.useSelectedRow({ rowKey: 'id' });\n  const [expandedKeys, setExpandedKeys] = useState(false);\n  const [checkRelation, setCheckRelation] = useState('parent');\n  const [lazyData, setLazyData] = useState(lazyRootData);\n\n  const handleLoadChildren = (item, { key }) =>\n    new Promise(resolve => {\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        const children = lazyChildrenMap[key] || [];\n        setLazyData(prev =>\n          mergeTreeChildren(prev, children, {\n            parentKeyValue: key,\n            dataType: 'treeList',\n            rowKey: 'id',\n            parentKey: 'parentId',\n            hasChildrenKey: 'hasChildren'\n          })\n        );\n        resolve();\n      }, 800);\n    });\n\n  return (\n    <Space direction=\"vertical\" size=\"large\" style={{ width: '100%' }}>\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>tree：嵌套 children</div>\n        <TableView dataSource={treeData} columns={columns} dataType=\"tree\" defaultExpandedKeys />\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>懒加载：hasChildren + onLoadChildren + mergeTreeChildren（展开显示 loading）</div>\n        <TableView dataSource={lazyData} columns={columns} dataType=\"treeList\" onLoadChildren={handleLoadChildren} />\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>移动端树形默认卡片：三角 + 勾选 + 面包屑</div>\n        <TableView\n          dataSource={treeListData}\n          columns={columns}\n          dataType=\"treeList\"\n          defaultExpandedKeys\n          treeTitleKey=\"name\"\n          renderMobile\n          rowSelection={mobileSelection.getRowSelection(treeListData, { allowSelectedAll: true, checkRelation: 'parent' })}\n        />\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>自定义 renderMobile：根节点 / 子级（meta.level）视觉区分</div>\n        <TableView\n          dataSource={treeListData}\n          columns={columns}\n          dataType=\"treeList\"\n          defaultExpandedKeys\n          treeTitleKey=\"name\"\n          rowSelection={customMobileSelection.getRowSelection(treeListData, { allowSelectedAll: true, checkRelation: 'parent' })}\n          renderMobile={({ displayDataSource, renderToolbar, getRowKey, getSelectionProps, getTreeRowMeta, getBreadcrumb, isExpandLoading, onToggleExpand }) => (\n            <div style={{ background: '#f5f5f5', borderRadius: 8, padding: 12 }}>\n              <div style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>{renderToolbar()}</div>\n              <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 10 }}>\n                {(displayDataSource || []).map(item => {\n                  const key = getRowKey(item);\n                  const selection = getSelectionProps(item);\n                  return (\n                    <OrgTreeMobileCard\n                      key={key}\n                      item={item}\n                      meta={getTreeRowMeta(item)}\n                      breadcrumb={getBreadcrumb(item)}\n                      loading={isExpandLoading(item)}\n                      onExpand={() => onToggleExpand(key)}\n                      {...selection}\n                    />\n                  );\n                })}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        />\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>checkRelation：parent（默认，值只留父级）/ all（含子孙）/ independent（互不影响）</div>\n        <Space style={{ marginBottom: 8 }} wrap>\n          <Radio.Group\n            value={checkRelation}\n            optionType=\"button\"\n            options={[\n              { label: 'parent', value: 'parent' },\n              { label: 'all', value: 'all' },\n              { label: 'independent', value: 'independent' }\n            ]}\n            onChange={e => {\n              setCheckRelation(e.target.value);\n              clearSelectedRows();\n            }}\n          />\n        </Space>\n        <TableView dataSource={treeListData} columns={columns} dataType=\"treeList\" defaultExpandedKeys rowSelection={getRowSelection(treeListData, { allowSelectedAll: true, checkRelation })} />\n        <div style={{ marginTop: 8 }}>已选 key：{selectedRowKeys.join(', ') || '无'}</div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>受控展开：true 全开 / false 全关 / key 数组</div>\n        <Space style={{ marginBottom: 8 }}>\n          <Button size=\"small\" onClick={() => setExpandedKeys(true)}>\n            全部展开\n          </Button>\n          <Button size=\"small\" onClick={() => setExpandedKeys(false)}>\n            全部收起\n          </Button>\n          <Button size=\"small\" onClick={() => setExpandedKeys(['1', '1-1'])}>\n            展开指定节点\n          </Button>\n        </Space>\n        <TableView dataSource={treeData} columns={columns} dataType=\"tree\" expandedKeys={expandedKeys} onExpandedKeysChange={setExpandedKeys} />\n      </div>\n    </Space>\n  );\n};\n\nrender(<TreeExample />);\n\n",

    title: "renderType",
    description: "列 renderType 配置：main / amount / tag / status / tagList / list / options / description，支持与 short / small / large 尺寸修饰组合",
    code: "const { TableView } = _TableView;\nconst { Flex } = antd;\n\nconst statusMap = {\n  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },\n  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },\n  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' }\n};\n\nconst categoryMap = {\n  企业客户: { type: 'default', text: '企业客户' },\n  战略客户: { type: 'processing', text: '战略客户' }\n};\n\nconst dataSource = [\n  {\n    id: 'ORD001',\n    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',\n    category: '企业客户',\n    tags: ['物流', '加急'],\n    keywords: ['合同', '附件', '春节前'],\n    remark: '客户要求春节前完成交付，需协调物流加急处理，并同步更新合同附件。',\n    amount: 42500,\n    status: '待发货'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD002',\n    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',\n    category: '战略客户',\n    tags: ['评审', '配置清单'],\n    keywords: ['需求评审', '配置清单'],\n    remark: '项目处于需求评审阶段，待客户确认最终配置清单后安排发货。',\n    amount: 85000,\n    status: '处理中'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD003',\n    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',\n    category: '企业客户',\n    tags: ['拣货', '付款完成'],\n    keywords: ['付款', '拣货', '发货'],\n    remark: '已完成付款，仓库正在拣货，预计两个工作日内发出第一批货物。',\n    amount: 120000,\n    status: '已完成'\n  }\n];\n\nconst columns = [\n  { name: 'id', title: '编号', renderType: 'small' },\n  {\n    name: 'customerName',\n    title: '客户名称',\n    renderType: 'main',\n    primary: true,\n    hover: true,\n    onClick: ({ item }) => console.log('查看客户详情:', item)\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'category',\n    title: '分类',\n    renderType: 'tag-short',\n    getValueOf: item => categoryMap[item.category]\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'tags',\n    title: '标签',\n    renderType: 'tagList',\n    getValueOf: item =>\n      (item.tags || []).map(text => ({\n        type: text === '加急' ? 'error' : 'processing',\n        text\n      }))\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'keywords',\n    title: '关键词',\n    renderType: 'list',\n    split: '、',\n    getValueOf: item => item.keywords\n  },\n  { name: 'remark', title: '备注', renderType: 'description' },\n  {\n    name: 'amount',\n    title: '金额',\n    renderType: 'amount',\n    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'status',\n    title: '状态',\n    renderType: 'status',\n    getValueOf: item => statusMap[item.status]\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'options',\n    title: '操作',\n    renderType: 'options',\n    getValueOf: item => {\n      const actions = [\n        { children: '查看', onClick: () => console.log('查看', item.id) },\n        { children: '编辑', onClick: () => console.log('编辑', item.id) }\n      ];\n      if (item.status !== '已完成') {\n        actions.push({\n          children: '删除',\n          isDelete: true,\n          message: `确定删除 ${item.id} 吗？`,\n          onClick: () => console.log('删除', item.id)\n        });\n      }\n      return actions;\n    }\n  }\n];\n\nconst BaseExample = () => {\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={24}>\n      <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.8 }}>\n        <p>\n          列配置 <code>renderType</code> 声明列的渲染方式，无需手写 <code>render</code>。内置类型：\n        </p>\n        <ul style={{ margin: '8px 0', paddingLeft: 20 }}>\n          <li><code>main</code> — 主信息列，支持 <code>primary</code> / <code>hover</code> / <code>onClick</code></li>\n          <li><code>amount</code> — 金额列，右对齐，配合 <code>format</code> 格式化</li>\n          <li><code>tag</code> — 单个 Tag，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{'{ type, text }'}</code></li>\n          <li><code>status</code> — 状态 Badge，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回 <code>{'{ type, text }'}</code></li>\n          <li><code>tagList</code> — 多个 Tag 列表</li>\n          <li><code>list</code> — 文本列表，可用 <code>split</code> 指定分隔符</li>\n          <li><code>options</code> — 操作列，<code>getValueOf</code> 返回按钮配置数组</li>\n          <li><code>description</code> — 长文本描述列</li>\n        </ul>\n        <p>\n          可与尺寸修饰词组合：<code>short</code> / <code>small</code> / <code>large</code>（如 <code>tag-short</code>、<code>status-small</code>、<code>main-large</code>）。\n          通过 <code>getValueOf</code> 传入 render 所需数据结构，通过 <code>format</code> 做日期、金额等展示格式化。\n        </p>\n      </div>\n      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} />\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nrender(<BaseExample />);\n\n",

    importStatement: "import * as _TableView from \"@kne/table-view\"",
    component: component_1

    component: component_3

    title: "column render",
    description: "列同时配置 render 与 renderType 时，render 优先级最高，覆盖内置 renderType 的单元格渲染",
    code: "const { TableView } = _TableView;\nconst { Flex, Tag } = antd;\n\nconst statusMap = {\n  待发货: { type: 'warning', text: '待发货' },\n  处理中: { type: 'processing', text: '处理中' },\n  已完成: { type: 'success', text: '已完成' }\n};\n\nconst dataSource = [\n  {\n    id: 'ORD001',\n    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',\n    amount: 42500,\n    status: '待发货'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD002',\n    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',\n    amount: 85000,\n    status: '处理中'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD003',\n    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',\n    amount: 120000,\n    status: '已完成'\n  }\n];\n\nconst columns = [\n  { name: 'id', title: '编号', renderType: 'small' },\n  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', renderType: 'main' },\n  {\n    name: 'amount',\n    title: '金额',\n    renderType: 'amount',\n    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'status',\n    title: '状态（仅 renderType）',\n    renderType: 'status',\n    getValueOf: item => statusMap[item.status]\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'statusRender',\n    title: '状态（render 优先）',\n    renderType: 'status',\n    getValueOf: item => statusMap[item.status],\n    render: (value, { dataSource }) => (\n      <span style={{ color: '#1677ff' }}>\n        自定义渲染：{dataSource.status}（未走 status Badge）\n      </span>\n    )\n  }\n];\n\nconst BaseExample = () => {\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={24}>\n      <div style={{ color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.8 }}>\n        <p>\n          列同时配置 <code>render</code> 与 <code>renderType</code> 时，\n          <Tag color=\"blue\" style={{ margin: '0 4px' }}>render 优先级最高</Tag>\n          ，会直接使用自定义 <code>render</code>，不再走内置 renderType。\n        </p>\n        <ul style={{ margin: '8px 0', paddingLeft: 20 }}>\n          <li>「状态（仅 renderType）」列：走内置 <code>status</code>，渲染 Badge</li>\n          <li>「状态（render 优先）」列：同样写了 <code>renderType: 'status'</code>，但因存在 <code>render</code>，最终显示自定义内容</li>\n          <li>renderType 仍可提供列宽等维度（width / min / max），仅单元格内容渲染被 <code>render</code> 覆盖</li>\n        </ul>\n      </div>\n      <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} />\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nrender(<BaseExample />);\n\n",

    name: "_TableView",

    importStatement: "import * as _TableView from \"@kne/table-view\"",

    component: component_3

    title: "renderMobile",

    code: "const { TableView, preset } = _TableView;\nconst { Flex, Tag, Card, Button, Dropdown, Checkbox, Radio } = antd;\nconst { useState, useMemo } = React;\n\nconst statusMap = {\n  已完成: { color: 'success', text: '已完成' },\n  处理中: { color: 'processing', text: '处理中' },\n  待发货: { color: 'warning', text: '待发货' }\n};\n\nconst dataSource = [\n  {\n    id: 'ORD001',\n    customerName: '深圳市腾讯计算机系统有限公司',\n    contact: '张三',\n    phone: '13800138000',\n    amount: 42500,\n    status: '已完成'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD002',\n    customerName: '华为技术有限公司',\n    contact: '李四',\n    phone: '13900149000',\n    amount: 85000,\n    status: '处理中'\n  },\n  {\n    id: 'ORD003',\n    customerName: '阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司',\n    contact: '王五',\n    phone: '13700157000',\n    amount: 120000,\n    status: '待发货'\n  }\n];\n\nconst columns = [\n  { name: 'id', title: '订单编号', width: 120, renderType: 'small' },\n  { name: 'customerName', title: '客户名称', span: 10, renderType: 'main', sort: true },\n  { name: 'contact', title: '联系人', width: 80 },\n  { name: 'phone', title: '联系电话', width: 130, render: value => value.replace(/(\\d{3})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})/, '$1-$2-$3') },\n  {\n    name: 'amount',\n    title: '订单金额',\n    sort: true,\n    renderType: 'amount',\n    format: 'number-style:decimal-maximumFractionDigits:0-useGrouping:true-suffix:元'\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'status',\n    title: '状态',\n    width: 100,\n    renderType: 'status',\n    getValueOf: item => ({ type: statusMap[item.status]?.color || 'default', text: item.status })\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'options',\n    title: '操作',\n    renderType: 'options',\n    getValueOf: item => [\n      { children: '查看', onClick: () => console.log('查看', item.id) },\n      { children: '编辑', onClick: () => console.log('编辑', item.id) },\n      { children: '删除', isDelete: true, message: `确定删除 ${item.id} 吗？`, onClick: () => console.log('删除', item.id) }\n    ]\n  }\n];\n\npreset({\n  renderMobile: {\n    orderCard: ({ renderBody, dataSource = [] }) => {\n      const totalAmount = dataSource.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);\n      return (\n        <div\n          className=\"preset-order-card-example\"\n          style={{\n            borderRadius: 12,\n            background: '#f5f7fa',\n            padding: 16\n          }}\n        >\n          <style>{`\n            .preset-order-card-example .info-page-table-mobile-card:not(.is-mobile-card-selected):not(.is-mobile-card-selected-all) {\n              background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f9f0ff 52%, #eef2ff 100%) !important;\n              border-color: #e8dfff !important;\n            }\n            .preset-order-card-example .info-page-table-mobile-card:not(.is-mobile-card-selected):not(.is-mobile-card-selected-all):hover {\n              background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fafafa 0%, #f3ebff 52%, #e8eeff 100%) !important;\n            }\n          `}</style>\n          <div style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>\n            <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" gap={8} style={{ marginBottom: 4 }}>\n              <div style={{ fontSize: 17, fontWeight: 600, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.88)' }}>近期订单</div>\n              <Tag color=\"purple\" style={{ margin: 0, flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                preset: orderCard\n              </Tag>\n            </Flex>\n            <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' }}>\n              {dataSource.length} 笔 · 合计 ¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"info-page-table\"\n            style={{\n              '--kne-table-cell-padding': '14px 8px'\n            }}\n          >\n            {renderBody()}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      );\n    }\n  }\n});\n\nconst formatPhone = phone => phone.replace(/(\\d{3})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})/, '$1-$2-$3');\n\nconst getOrderActions = item => [\n  { key: 'view', label: '查看', onClick: () => console.log('查看', item.id) },\n  { key: 'edit', label: '编辑', onClick: () => console.log('编辑', item.id) },\n  { key: 'delete', label: '删除', danger: true, onClick: () => console.log('删除', item.id) }\n];\n\nconst OrderMobileCard = ({ item, checked, disabled, onCheckChange, selectionType = 'checkbox' }) => {\n  const status = statusMap[item.status] || { color: 'default', text: item.status };\n  const actionItems = getOrderActions(item);\n  const isSelected = checked;\n  const SelectionControl = selectionType === 'radio' ? Radio : Checkbox;\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      style={{\n        display: 'flex',\n        alignItems: 'flex-start',\n        gap: 12,\n        background: isSelected ? 'var(--primary-color-1, #e6f4ff)' : '#fff',\n        borderRadius: 12,\n        padding: 16,\n        border: `1px solid ${isSelected ? 'var(--primary-color-2, var(--primary-color, #1677ff))' : 'transparent'}`,\n        boxShadow: '0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)',\n        color: isSelected ? 'var(--primary-color, #1677ff)' : undefined,\n        boxSizing: 'border-box'\n      }}\n    >\n      <SelectionControl checked={checked} disabled={disabled} onChange={onCheckChange} style={{ marginTop: 2, flexShrink: 0 }} />\n      <div style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>\n        <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" gap={8} style={{ marginBottom: 10 }}>\n          <Flex align=\"center\" gap={8} wrap=\"wrap\" style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>\n            <Tag color={status.color} style={{ margin: 0 }}>\n              {status.text}\n            </Tag>\n            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' }}>{item.id}</span>\n          </Flex>\n          <Dropdown\n            trigger={['click']}\n            menu={{\n              items: actionItems.map(({ key, label, danger, onClick }) => ({\n                key,\n                label,\n                danger,\n                onClick: ({ domEvent }) => {\n                  domEvent.stopPropagation();\n                  onClick();\n                }\n              }))\n            }}\n          >\n            <Button type=\"text\" size=\"small\" style={{ padding: '0 4px' }} onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>\n              ···\n            </Button>\n          </Dropdown>\n        </Flex>\n        <div\n          style={{\n            fontSize: 16,\n            fontWeight: 600,\n            color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.88)',\n            lineHeight: 1.5,\n            marginBottom: 6\n          }}\n        >\n          {item.customerName}\n        </div>\n        <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', lineHeight: 1.6 }}>\n          {item.contact} · {formatPhone(item.phone)}\n        </div>\n        <Flex\n          justify=\"space-between\"\n          align=\"center\"\n          gap={12}\n          style={{\n            marginTop: 14,\n            paddingTop: 12,\n            borderTop: '1px solid #f0f0f0'\n          }}\n        >\n          <Flex align=\"baseline\" gap={6} style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>\n            <span style={{ fontSize: 12, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', flexShrink: 0 }}>订单金额</span>\n            <span style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600, color: '#1677ff' }}>¥{item.amount.toLocaleString()}</span>\n          </Flex>\n          <Flex gap={4} align=\"center\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n            {actionItems.slice(0, 2).map(({ key, label, onClick }) => (\n              <Button\n                key={key}\n                type=\"link\"\n                size=\"small\"\n                style={{ padding: '0 4px', height: 'auto' }}\n                onClick={e => {\n                  e.stopPropagation();\n                  onClick();\n                }}\n              >\n                {label}\n              </Button>\n            ))}\n          </Flex>\n        </Flex>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst DefaultMobileCards = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const totalAmount = selectKeys.reduce((sum, id) => sum + (dataSource.find(d => d.id === id)?.amount || 0), 0);\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n        <code>renderMobile={'{true}'}</code>：移动端启用默认卡片 List（每行一张卡片，操作列靠右）；\n        开启 <code>allowSelectedAll</code> 后顶部工具栏左侧显示全选。请用示例预览的手机模式查看效果。\n      </div>\n      <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>\n        <span>\n          已选 <strong>{selectKeys.length}</strong> 个订单，总金额 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>\n        </span>\n      </Flex>\n      <TableView\n        dataSource={dataSource}\n        columns={columns}\n        size=\"large\"\n        renderMobile\n        rowSelection={{\n          type: 'checkbox',\n          allowSelectedAll: true,\n          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n          onChange: keys => setSelectKeys(keys)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst SortState = ({ sort }) => (\n  <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, padding: '10px 12px', background: '#f5f5f5', borderRadius: 8, fontSize: 13 }}>\n    当前排序：\n    {sort.length ? (\n      <span>\n        {sort.map(item => (\n          <Tag key={item.name} color=\"blue\" style={{ marginLeft: 8 }}>\n            {item.name} {item.sort}\n          </Tag>\n        ))}\n      </span>\n    ) : (\n      <span style={{ marginLeft: 8, color: '#999' }}>无</span>\n    )}\n  </div>\n);\n\nconst MobileSortExample = () => {\n  const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({\n    defaultSort: [{ name: 'amount', sort: 'DESC' }],\n    onSortChange: value => console.log('移动端排序变更:', value)\n  });\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);\n\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={24}>\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n          移动端排序：列配置 <code>sort: true</code>，配合 <code>TableView.useSort</code> 传入 <code>mobileSortToolbar</code>。\n          工具栏居右，下拉选择排序列，方向为单图标，点击按「降序 → 升序 → 取消」循环（与 PC 端列头排序一致）；也可在下拉选「取消排序」清除。数据需自行用 <code>sortDataSource</code> 排序。\n        </div>\n        <SortState sort={sort} />\n        <TableView\n          dataSource={sortedData}\n          columns={columns}\n          size=\"large\"\n          renderMobile\n          sortRender={sortRender}\n          mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar}\n        />\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n          排序与全选同时开启：工具栏左侧全选、右侧排序。\n        </div>\n        <MobileSortWithSelectAll />\n      </div>\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nconst MobileSortWithSelectAll = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({});\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);\n\n  return (\n    <TableView\n      dataSource={sortedData}\n      columns={columns}\n      size=\"large\"\n      renderMobile\n      sortRender={sortRender}\n      mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar}\n      rowSelection={{\n        type: 'checkbox',\n        allowSelectedAll: true,\n        selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n        onChange: keys => setSelectKeys(keys)\n      }}\n    />\n  );\n};\n\nconst CustomMobileRender = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({});\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);\n  const totalAmount = dataSource.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);\n  const selectedAmount = selectKeys.reduce((sum, id) => sum + (dataSource.find(d => d.id === id)?.amount || 0), 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n        <code>renderMobile</code> 为 function 时完全接管渲染，可自定义卡片内容；\n        全选 / 排序请用回调里的 <code>renderToolbar()</code>（与默认 MobileCard 同一套实现），\n        行勾选用 <code>getSelectionProps(item)</code>，不必自己维护全选状态或排序 UI。\n        桌面端仍走 <code>render</code>。\n      </div>\n      <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>\n        <span>\n          已选 <strong>{selectKeys.length}</strong> 个订单，金额 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{selectedAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>\n        </span>\n      </Flex>\n      <Card size=\"small\" title=\"近期订单\" extra={<Tag>桌面 render</Tag>} styles={{ body: { padding: 0 } }}>\n        <Flex\n          justify=\"space-between\"\n          align=\"center\"\n          style={{ padding: '12px 16px', background: '#fafafa', borderBottom: '1px solid #f0f0f0' }}\n        >\n          <Flex gap={8} align=\"center\">\n            <Tag color=\"blue\">{dataSource.length} 笔</Tag>\n            <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.65)', fontSize: 13 }}>\n              合计 <strong style={{ color: '#52c41a' }}>¥{totalAmount.toLocaleString()}</strong>\n            </span>\n          </Flex>\n          <span style={{ color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)', fontSize: 12 }}>桌面端 render 自定义外层</span>\n        </Flex>\n        <TableView\n          dataSource={sortedData}\n          columns={columns}\n          sortRender={sortRender}\n          mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar}\n          rowSelection={{\n            type: 'checkbox',\n            allowSelectedAll: true,\n            selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n            onChange: keys => setSelectKeys(keys)\n          }}\n          render={({ renderBody }) => <div style={{ overflowX: 'auto' }}>{renderBody()}</div>}\n          renderMobile={({ dataSource: mobileList = [], renderToolbar, getSelectionProps, getRowKey }) => (\n            <div\n              style={{\n                borderRadius: 12,\n                background: '#f5f7fa',\n                padding: 16\n              }}\n            >\n              <div style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>\n                <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" gap={8} style={{ marginBottom: 4 }}>\n                  <div style={{ fontSize: 17, fontWeight: 600, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.88)' }}>近期订单</div>\n                  <Tag color=\"processing\" style={{ margin: 0, flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                    renderMobile\n                  </Tag>\n                </Flex>\n                <div style={{ fontSize: 12, color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)' }}>\n                  {mobileList.length} 笔 · 合计 ¥{mobileList.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0).toLocaleString()}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              {renderToolbar()}\n              <Flex vertical gap={12} style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>\n                {mobileList.map(item => {\n                  const selection = getSelectionProps(item);\n                  return (\n                    <OrderMobileCard\n                      key={getRowKey(item)}\n                      item={item}\n                      checked={selection.checked}\n                      disabled={selection.disabled}\n                      onCheckChange={selection.onChange}\n                    />\n                  );\n                })}\n              </Flex>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        />\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst CustomMobileRadioRender = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({});\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);\n  const selectedOrder = dataSource.find(item => item.id === selectKeys[0]);\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n        自定义 <code>renderMobile</code> 单选：<code>rowSelection.type</code> 设为 <code>radio</code>，\n        卡片上的 Radio 直接绑 <code>getSelectionProps(item)</code>，选中态与切换逻辑由 TableView 管理；\n        工具栏 <code>renderToolbar()</code> 此时仅显示排序（单选无全选）。\n      </div>\n      <Flex justify=\"space-between\" align=\"center\" style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}>\n        <span>\n          当前选中：\n          {selectedOrder ? (\n            <strong>\n              {selectedOrder.id} · ¥{selectedOrder.amount.toLocaleString()}\n            </strong>\n          ) : (\n            <span style={{ color: '#999' }}>未选择</span>\n          )}\n        </span>\n      </Flex>\n      <TableView\n        dataSource={sortedData}\n        columns={columns}\n        sortRender={sortRender}\n        mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar}\n        rowSelection={{\n          type: 'radio',\n          selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n          onChange: keys => setSelectKeys(keys)\n        }}\n        renderMobile={({ dataSource: mobileList = [], renderToolbar, getSelectionProps, getRowKey }) => (\n          <div\n            style={{\n              borderRadius: 12,\n              background: '#f5f7fa',\n              padding: 16\n            }}\n          >\n            {renderToolbar()}\n            <Flex vertical gap={12} style={{ marginTop: 12 }}>\n              {mobileList.map(item => {\n                const selection = getSelectionProps(item);\n                return (\n                  <OrderMobileCard\n                    key={getRowKey(item)}\n                    item={item}\n                    selectionType=\"radio\"\n                    checked={selection.checked}\n                    disabled={selection.disabled}\n                    onCheckChange={selection.onChange}\n                  />\n                );\n              })}\n            </Flex>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n};\n\nconst PresetStringRender = () => {\n  const [selectKeys, setSelectKeys] = useState([]);\n  const { sort, sortRender, mobileSortToolbar } = TableView.useSort({\n    defaultSort: [{ name: 'amount', sort: 'DESC' }]\n  });\n  const sortedData = useMemo(() => TableView.sortDataSource(dataSource, sort, columns), [sort]);\n\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={24}>\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n          <code>renderMobile=\"orderCard\"</code>：通过 <code>preset({'{ renderMobile }'})</code> 注册名称对应的渲染函数；\n          仅移动端生效，支持全选与选中样式。可配合 <code>mobileSortToolbar</code> 开启排序。\n        </div>\n        <TableView\n          dataSource={sortedData}\n          columns={columns}\n          size=\"large\"\n          renderMobile=\"orderCard\"\n          sortRender={sortRender}\n          mobileSortToolbar={mobileSortToolbar}\n          rowSelection={{\n            type: 'checkbox',\n            allowSelectedAll: true,\n            selectedRowKeys: selectKeys,\n            onChange: keys => setSelectKeys(keys)\n          }}\n        />\n      </div>\n      <div>\n        <div style={{ marginBottom: 12, color: '#666', fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7 }}>\n          <code>renderMobile=\"notRegistered\"</code>：preset 中未注册时视为未开启，移动端仍显示普通表格。\n        </div>\n        <TableView dataSource={dataSource} columns={columns} renderMobile=\"notRegistered\" />\n      </div>\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nconst BaseExample = () => {\n  return (\n    <Flex vertical gap={32}>\n      <DefaultMobileCards />\n      <MobileSortExample />\n      <CustomMobileRender />\n      <CustomMobileRadioRender />\n      <PresetStringRender />\n    </Flex>\n  );\n};\n\nrender(<BaseExample />);\n\n",
